top_risk: Agent-runtime reliability: false-success reporting (T-1003) and timeout-induced state corruption (T-1005) both undermine core task execution trustworthiness. Both represent failures in the runtime's state-machine consistency around task lifecycle transitions.
recommended_actions: Fix T-1003: ensure task completion is not reported until all requested artifacts are verified as written (data-integrity defect, critical)
Fix T-1005: implement deterministic timeout handling so tool-call timeouts always leave tasks in a defined, recoverable state (operational safety, high)
Fix T-1006: resolve intermittent payment processing failure affecting premium-tier customers (revenue impact, high)
